name: Kwik Trip #1048 - West Salem

name: Kwik Trip #494 - Onalaska

name: Sparta Travel Center (Roady's)

name: Kwik Trip #775 - Mauston

name: Pilot Travel Center #164
description: Pilot travel center at I-90/I-94 Exit 69 in Mauston with 24-hour diesel (7 fuel lanes), 7 showers, a Wendy's, about 95 truck parking spaces and a CAT Scale.

name: Mauston Interstate BP Travel Plaza
description: Independent BP-branded travel plaza at I-90/I-94 Exit 69 in Mauston with 24-hour diesel (6 fuel lanes), 2 showers and about 20 truck parking spaces.

name: Lyndon Station BP

description: Certified CAT Scale at the Kwik Trip #796 truckstop at the Tomah I-90/I-94 split (signed I-94 Exit 143).

name: CAT Scale at Love's Oakdale

description: Certified CAT Scale at Pilot Travel Center #164 at I-90/I-94 Exit 69 in Mauston.

name: Pomp's Tire Service - La Crosse
description: Wisconsin-based commercial/OTR truck tire dealer serving the La Crosse I-90 area with 24-hour commercial road assistance and Bandag retreading.

name: Pomp's Tire Service - Tomah
description: Pomp's Tire commercial truck tire and retread service in Tomah near the I-90/I-94 junction, offering commercial transportation tire service.

name: Sparta Weigh Station
description: WisDOT State Patrol Safety and Weight Enforcement Facility on I-90 near mile marker 22 (eastbound) just east of Sparta in Monroe County.

name: Wisconsin Welcome Center - La Crosse
description: WisDOT Safety Rest Area 31 / Wisconsin Welcome Center on eastbound I-90 near mile marker 1 on French Island, La Crosse (first stop after the Mississippi River/Dresbach bridge), with car/truck/bus/RV parking, restrooms and travel info.

name: Sparta Safety Rest Area
description: WisDOT safety rest area on westbound I-90 near mile marker 21 west of Sparta, recently rebuilt with increased truck parking, restrooms and accessible facilities.

name: Lyndon Safety Rest Area
description: WisDOT Safety Rest Area 9 on eastbound I-90/I-94 near mile marker 74, northwest of Lyndon Station, with car/truck parking, restrooms, family facilities and travel info.

name: Mauston Safety Rest Area
description: WisDOT Safety Rest Area 10 on westbound I-90/I-94 near mile marker 75, southeast of Mauston, with car/truck parking, accessible restrooms, vending and travel info.

name: Craig's Towing
description: 24-hour heavy-duty towing and recovery plus mobile truck/trailer/tire repair serving the Wisconsin Dells I-90/I-94 corridor, with a 60-ton rotator, winch-outs, load shifts/transfers and forced regens.

name: La Crosse Transport Refrigeration
description: Truck refrigeration and mobile service provider off I-90 Exit 4 in Onalaska with a 10-bay service facility and immediate mobile service for reefer units.
